name: proofread
description: Proofread a section for grammar, terminology and framework-correct labels, preserving every approved figure.

name: consistency_sweep
description: Verify narrative numbers match calc_result and totals reconcile across sections; return consistency issues.

name: build_investor_summary
description: Assemble the investor highlights summary from approved content (headline metrics + highlights).

name: emit_publication_package
description: Return the final publication package (final_sections + consistency_issues + investor_summary + publication_checklist). Call exactly once.
